top_findings.summary: The email skill requests OAuth scopes for Google Calendar and Contacts in addition to Gmail. While Contacts access is justified for contact lookup functionality (which is part of the skill's stated purpose), Calendar access is unrelated to the skill's primary purpose of sending and drafting professional emails. The skill description does not mention any calendar-related functionality, and requesting this scope forces users to grant unnecessary permissions to their calendar data, constituting permission overreach beyond what is needed for email operations.
